name: DLL Load via LSASS Detected
description: Detects the loading of a DLL into the LSASS process using an undocumented registry key. This is a highly suspicious activity, as it can allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code within the LSASS process, potentially leading to credential dumping and complete system compromise.

prompts.prompt: Highly suspicious DLL load into LSASS process detected via registry modification. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Registry Key** {registry_key}, **Registry Value** {registry_value}. Investigate this critical event immediately as it may indicate an attempt at credential dumping or system compromise.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: Sysmon Event ID for Registry value set or Registry key value set (e.g., 12 or 13).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The process that modified the registry.

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The registry key that was modified.

parameters.name: registry_value
parameters.description: The value set in the registry key.
